zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix於1230年出生在法國阿利艾米波瓦時，她的父親Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX21歲，母親Jeanne de BRUYERES11227歲。她於1250年與Philippe II de MONFORT結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年5月30日在法國米迪-列內斯塔卡斯特爾享年54歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯馬勒-哈梅奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix于1230年出生在法国阿利艾米波瓦时，她的父亲Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX21岁，母亲Jeanne de BRUYERES11227岁。她于1250年与Philippe II de MONFORT结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年5月30日在法国米迪-列內斯塔卡斯特爾享年54岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯馬勒-哈梅奧。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix was born in 1230, in Mirepoix, Ariège, France, her father, Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX, was 21 and her mother, Jeanne de BRUYERES, was 11227. She married Philippe II de MONFORT in 1250. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 30 May 1284, in Castres, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix est née en 1230, à Mirepoix, Ariège, France, son père, Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de BRUYERES, avait 11227 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe II de MONFORT en 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mai 1284, à Castres, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix 1230 in Mirepoix, Ariège, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX 21 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de BRUYERES 11227. Sie hat 1250 Philippe II de MONFORT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Mai 1284 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Castres, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix è nata il nel 1230 nel Mirepoix, Ariège, Francia, sua padre, Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de BRUYERES, aveva 11227 anni. Lei sposato Philippe II de MONFORT nel 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 maggio 1284, nel Castres, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix(이)가 1230년 프랑스 애리e지 미어포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de BRUYERES(은)는 11227세였다. 그녀는 1250년 Philippe II de MONFORT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 5월 30일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른 카스트레스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 매그니-레스-함이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix nasceu em 1230, em Mirepoix, Ariège, França, seu pai, Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de BRUYERES, tinha 11227 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe II de MONFORT em 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de maio de 1284, em Castres, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix родилась в 1230 г. в местности мирепоикс, ариeдж, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de BRUYERES, 11227. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe II de MONFORT в 1250 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 мая 1284 г. в местности кастресь, тарн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности магни-лес-хамокс, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne De Lévis-Mirepoix nació en 1230, en Mirepoix, Ariège, Francia, su papá, Guy II de LEVIS MIREPOIX, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jeanne de BRUYERES, tenía 11227 años. Se casó con Philippe II de MONFORT en 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1284, en Castres, Tarn, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Magny-les-Hameaux, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
